sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7510" key="a)nastalu/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναστᾰλύζω</orth>, <sense id="n7510.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sob,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:43:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43.4</biblScope></bibl>.
